description_long: This house features a two-story central section flanked by single-story wings, all topped with hipped roofs. The exterior is clad in light-colored siding with dark trim around the windows and roof edges, giving it a classic, understated appearance. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, a balcony above the entryway, and a small awning over a side door. Multiple symmetrically arranged windows provide ample natural light, while the rear and side views reveal additional windows and a secondary covered porch. The rooflines are clean and consistent, with the main roof intersecting the wings at right angles. Overall, the structure suggests a blend of Colonial and Craftsman influences, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A two-story house with hipped roofs, symmetrical windows, and a covered front porch with columns and a balcony above. The exterior is light-colored with dark trim, blending Colonial and Craftsman styles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two-story central section and single-story wing, with visible windows and rooflines.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with a covered porch, balcony, symmetrical windows, and a small awning over a side door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the two-story central section and single-story wing with windows.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the house with a row of windows and the continuation of the hipped roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, balcony above, steps leading to the main door, and a small awning over a side door
